objections.rate:
Rate/Byaj Zyada Hai:

Reframe karo: "Bhaiya, rate se zyada faida dekho."

Hisaab dikhao:
- Tractor EMI = Rs.11,000/month
- Apna tractor hone se fasal = Rs.2-3 lakh zyada
- EMI ek hafte mein nikal aayi!

Phir poochho: "Kaunsi bank ne kam rate diya? Batao ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” MMFSL negotiate bhi karta hai."

Kabhi defend mat karo ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” return dikhao.

"Isliye toh MMFSL hai ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” aaj ek paisa nahi chahiye. Sirf kagaz do, 2 din mein loan pass."

objections.delay:

objections.bank:
Bank vs MMFSL:
- Bank mein ITR chahiye ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” MMFSL mein zameen ke kagaz
- Bank ke chakkar ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” MMFSL ghar aata hai
- Bank 2-3 hafte ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” MMFSL 2 working days
- Bank rural nahi ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” MMFSL 4 lakh+ gaon

"Bank ne kitne chakkar lagwaye? MMFSL mein ek baar aao ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” ghar baith ke ho jaayega."

1. Problem sunno: "Aaj bina tractor ke kya takleef hai?" ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” sunne do.
